segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, I just landed, and I'm trying to get to South Station with luggage. What's the easiest way?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Take the Silver Line bus from outside the terminal. It goes straight to South Station.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Is it okay with two suitcases, or would an Uber be easier?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: The bus is fine with luggage. Just keep your bags close and out of the aisle.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Do I need to buy a ticket before I get on?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: No, just follow the signs for buses and ground transportation.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: So I go downstairs, follow ground transportation, and look for the Silver Line?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. I just wanted to make sure before dragging my bags around.
